allow:
Bash(pwsh -Command '
$token = az account get-access-token --resource https://database.windows.net/ --query accessToken -o tsv
$conn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection
$conn.ConnectionString = "Server=tcp:yss-sql-prod.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=yss-prod;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;"
$conn.AccessToken = $token
$conn.Open\(\)
$cmd = $conn.CreateCommand\(\)
$cmd.CommandText = "SELECT ag.Name AS AgeGroup, COUNT\(*\) AS MatchCount FROM Matches m JOIN Regions r ON m.RegionId = r.Id JOIN AgeGroups ag ON m.AgeGroupId = ag.Id WHERE r.Name = N'\\''FEST'\\'' GROUP BY ag.Name ORDER BY ag.Name"
$reader = $cmd.ExecuteReader\(\)
while \($reader.Read\(\)\) {
    Write-Host "$\($reader["AgeGroup"]\)`t$\($reader["MatchCount"]\)"
}
$conn.Close\(\)
' 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{r[""Rank""]:>3}. {r[""TeamName""]:<40} ELO={r[""EloRating""]}''''\) for r in data[:5]]")
Bash(find YSS.Data YSS.Ingestion YSS.Functions YSS.Tests YSS.Verification -name *.cs)
